name: 内格夫 | 军队之辉
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been covered in a metallic foil stamped with a camouflage pattern. Remember your training
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器覆上了印有迷彩图案的金属箔。 勿忘在部队的训练时光
